Hero.title: Building software with intention
Hero.subtitle: Software Engineer with a Computer Engineering degree from FEUP and currently pursuing a Master's in CS (Machine Learning) at UCPH, I build accessible, maintainable interfaces while leveraging data and AI to shape smarter, more human-centered products.

Projects.title: Selected Projects
Projects.populiDesc: A platform to help citizens find concise, structured, and unbiased information about the politicians they elect. Features include deputy profiles, legislative proposals, and an AI chat assistant for better-informed political opinions.
Projects.cherryPickDesc: Cross-format cultural recommendation platform. Users input a book, movie, show, or album and receive curated picks across media types. Hackathon prototype with a full redesign in progress.
Projects.twoAuctionDesc: Web application that brings live auction dynamics online, enabling users to buy and sell items with a secure, interactive experience for bidders and sellers.
